heroHeadline: 2,000 Years of German History: From Teutoburg Forest to the Merz Government
heroSubtitle: Charting Germany's evolution from Germanic tribes and the Holy Roman Empire through Reformation, industrialization, two world wars, Nazi dictatorship, Cold War division, and reunification to its current role as an EU pillar — navigating energy transition, migration challenges, AfD populism, and democratic renewal under Chancellor Merz.
footerNote: Data sourced from official German federal records (Bundesarchiv, Bundestag, Bundesregierung), major German and international media, and EU/NATO/international bodies. Historical data draws on scholarly consensus.
